section.title: Research
section.subtitle: Core Research Areas
section.description: Research themes that connect human-centered AI, advanced computing, health technology, data science, and applied software systems.

items.title: Machine Learning & Data Science
items.summary: Predictive modelling, classification, feature engineering, explainability, and data-driven decision support.

items.title: Deep Learning & Multimodal AI
items.summary: Representation learning from signals, text, images, graphs, and multimodal research datasets.

items.title: Biomedical & Health AI
items.summary: AI systems for physiological signals, sleep analysis, health monitoring, and clinical decision support.

items.title: NLP, Generative AI & Agents
items.summary: Language AI, domain assistants, research automation, responsible generation, and agentic workflows.

items.title: Software Engineering Research
items.summary: Human-centered software systems, web platforms, research tools, automation, and applied development practices.

items.title: AI for Education & Training
items.summary: Student-centred learning systems, intelligent tutors, assessment support, and research-skill development.
